title: Register as a non-resident doing business in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Register as a non-resident doing business in Canada
You may be looking for : Register as a Canadian resident

## Important information for individuals with a temporary SIN starting with 9
If your temporary social insurance number (SIN) starts with 9, you must use Business Registration Online to register and instantly get a business number (BN) as well as CRA program accounts. For more information, go to Important information for individuals with a temporary SIN starting with 9 .
Registering online is the easiest way to register for a BN and certain CRA program accounts.
- Non-resident business registration using the online form
- Program accounts with a separate registration process

## Non-resident business registration using the online form
Use the Non-Resident Business Registration online form to register for a BN and CRA program accounts if any of the following apply:
- your business is incorporated outside Canada
- your business is located outside Canada
- your SIN starts with 0
- you do not have a SIN
Use this online form to register for any of the following at the same time:
- Business number (BN)
- GST/HST (RT) including digital economy
- Payroll deductions (RP)
- Information returns (RZ)
- Corporation income tax (RC)
- Underused Housing Tax (RU) (for corporations only)
- Global minimum tax (PT)
Things to keep in mind:
- The services are available 21 hours a day. Due to daily maintenance activities, the services are not available for three hours a day from 3 am to 6 am (Eastern time)
- Your online session times out after 30 minutes of inactivity
- You cannot save information during the registration process
Non-Resident Business Registration

### If you are unable to register online
If you cannot register online with the non-resident online form, you can:
You can register for a BN and the following program accounts on the same form:
- GST/HST (RT) for digital economy - normal only
- Payroll deductions (RP)
- Information returns (RZ)
- Corporation income tax (RC)
You cannot use this form to register for the following:
- GST/HST (RT) for digital economy - simplified
- Underused Housing Tax (RU)
- Fill out the appropriate sections you want to register for on Form RC1 - Request for a Business Number and Certain Program Accounts
- Send your completed form: By mail : Option 1 Non-resident Registration and Security Atlantic Tax Centre Canada Revenue Agency 275 Pope Rd Summerside PE C1N 6A2 By fax : Option 2 Fax number: 1-519-971-2011
- By mail : Option 1 Non-resident Registration and Security Atlantic Tax Centre Canada Revenue Agency 275 Pope Rd Summerside PE C1N 6A2
Non-resident Registration and Security Atlantic Tax Centre Canada Revenue Agency 275 Pope Rd Summerside PE C1N 6A2
- By fax : Option 2 Fax number: 1-519-971-2011
Fax number: 1-519-971-2011

## Program accounts with a separate registration process
You can only register for certain program accounts using the Non-Resident Business Registration online form. If the program account you need is not available in the online form, you may still use it to register for a BN.

### How to register for the additional program accounts
Find out how to register for:
The only option to register is to fill in a paper form.
If you do not have a BN: You must get a BN before you register for this program account.
For registration details: Air Travellers Security Charge program account
The only option to register is through the Digital services tax account registration web form.
If you do not have a BN: You will get a BN through the registration process.
For registration details: How to register for a Digital services tax (DST) program account
The only option to register is to fill out the required forms related to your business.
If you do not have a BN: You must get a BN before you register for this program account.
For registration details: Excise duty forms
The only option to register is to fill out the required forms related to your business.
If you do not have a BN: You must get a BN before you register for this program account.
For registration details: Excise taxes and other levies
As of October 21, 2024 , the import and export program account is administered by the Canada Border Service Agency (CBSA).
If you do not have a BN: You must get a BN before you register for this program account.
For registration details: Register for or modify an import-export program account
The only option to register is to fill out a form.
If you do not have a BN: You must get a BN before you register for this program account.
For registration details: Insurance premium tax program account

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
